title: leontodon hispidus subsp. alpinus
intro: Leontodon hispidus subsp. alpinus, also known as Alpine Hawkbit, is a subspecies of the Leontodon hispidus plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family. The medicinal properties of Alpine Hawkbit include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for colds, fever, and respiratory issues. Alpine Hawkbit can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of illness.
